EDANUR CİHAN
Telefon: 0541 561 7539

Adres: İstanbul
Doğum Tarihi: 13.10.2003
İstanbul Sağlık ve Teknoloji Üniversitesi – Endüstri Mühendisliği (İngilizce, Tam Burslu)
2022 – 2027 (Devam Ediyor)
DENEYİM
Perfektüp Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. – Üretim Stajyeri
(Tarih: 07/2025 – 08/2025)
- Üretim hattında zaman etütleri yaparak iş istasyonlarındaki süre farklarını analiz ettim.
- Verimlilik artırma ve kaynak israfını azaltma amaçlı gözlemlerde bulundum.
- Hat dengeleme prensiplerine uygun geliştirme önerileri sundum.
- Üretim sürecinde iş akış şeması çıkararak darboğaz noktalarını belirledim.
- Malzeme akışı ve stok hareketlerini inceledim, gözlemlerimi raporladım.
- İş güvenliği ve kalite kontrol süreçleri hakkında saha gözlemleri gerçekleştirdim.
YETENEKLER
- Microsoft Excel: Temel formüller, veri girişleri ve düzenleme, tablo oluturma ve grafikler.
- Microsoft Office programlarını etkin biçimde kullanma becerisi
- Python: Temel veri tipleri, kontrol yapıları, veri işlemleri ve hesaplamaları.
- Yabancı Dil: İngilizce (C1)
- Kişisel: Analitik düşünme, problem çözme, ekip çalışması, zaman yönetimi

¨
Sercan Ozkan
Computer Engineering Student
Istanbul, Turkey
Phone: +90 546 536 31 21
Email: ozkansercan55@gmail.com
GitHub: github.com/SercanOzkan55
Profile
Computer Engineering student with strong foundations in algorithms, data structures, and object-oriented
programming. Industry internship experience in real-time video streaming, image processing, and latency
optimization using RTSP/RTP protocols. Proficient in Java, Python, and C++, with active project devel-
opment showcased on GitHub. Seeking a Software or Backend Engineering Internship / Junior Developer
role.
Experience
Intern Software Engineer
Dasal Havacılık – Istanbul, Turkey
July 2025 – August 2025
• Worked on real-time video streaming systems using drone-captured video feeds
• Analyzed and improved image processing pipelines to enhance visual quality
• Investigated end-to-end latency issues in real-time systems and proposed optimization methods
• Studied and applied streaming protocols including RTSP and RTP
• Developed approaches to minimize transmission delay and improve real-time performance
• Gained hands-on experience with low-latency system design and performance analysis
Projects
Who Wants To Be a Millionaire – Java, TCP Sockets
• Developed a multiplayer quiz game using TCP socket-based client-server architecture
• Implemented real-time question flow, scoring logic, and player synchronization
• Focused on network communication, concurrency, and game state management
Neon Space Duel – JavaScript, HTML, CSS
• Designed a browser-based AI-driven space duel game
• Implemented game mechanics, collision detection, and AI behavior logic
• Focused on performance and real-time interaction
JavaMiniFarmGame – Java, OOP
• Developed a console-based mini farming simulation game using Java
• Applied object-oriented programming principles such as inheritance and encapsulation
• Implemented resource management and user interaction logic
FoodApp – HTML, CSS, MySQL
• Developed a basic food ordering application using Java
• Implemented menu management, order processing, and modular code structure
Technical Skills
Programming Languages: Java, Python, C++
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Concepts: Data Structures, Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Client-Server Architecture, Real-
Time Systems, Video Streaming, Latency Optimization
Protocols: TCP, RTP, RTSP
Tools: Git, Visual Studio Code, IntelliJ IDEA
Operating Systems: Windows
Education
B.Sc. Computer Engineering (2022 – Present)
Istanbul Health and Technology University
GPA: 3.80 / 4.00
B.Sc. Industrial Engineering (Transferred)
GPA: 3.89 / 4.00
Languages
English – Speaking: B1+ Writing: B2 Technical Reading: B2/C1

original_text:
RESUME
EHTESHAM KHAN
235/19, Tughlakabaad Ext.
New Delhi- 110019
Mobile no: +919310131659 , 8874060242
E mail Id: ehteshamkhan503@gmail.com
Objective
To optimally utilize the present abilities, expertise and knowledge in the organization, so as
to enable the organization achieve its goals and at the same time capture opportunities for
constant learning and career development.
Skill Set
 Good knowledge of circuit boards, processors, & electrical circuits.
 Proficient in transmission, switching, control, and operation system.
 Strong technical, mathematics and physics skill.
 Innovative thinking and positive approach. Able to grasp/learn concepts and
procedures quickly.
 Hands on experience on Ms-Office, MS office PowerPoint
Educational Background
Professional:
 B.Tech in Electrical & Electronics Engineering from Kanpur Institute Of
Technology, Kanpur, in year 2010-14 with 80.34% marks.
Academic:
 12th from Shah Faiz Public School in the year 2010 with 71.2% marks.
 10th from C.B.S.E. in the year 2008 62.2% marks.
Industrial Training Attended
 Organization : Panki Thermal Power Station , Kanpur
 Duration : Four Weeks.
 Project Title : Control & Instrumentation.
 Synopsis : Undertaken detailed training to observe, control and manipulate
Electrical quantities by the use of Control and Instrumentation
System(C&I). It governs the whole functioning & operation power
plant through DDC-MIS (Distributed Digital Control Monitoring &
Instrument Information System).C&I begins with sensor that
detect measured value and control strategy is activated in power
plant.
Academic Project
 Project: Electricity Generation by Windmill & Control with Microcontroller.
 Synopsis : This project aimed at detailed study and introduction of Wind Mill
technique to use renewable source of energy (Wind Energy) to convert it
into Electrical energy. Developed the technique to automatically select
the available voltage to best voltage option for consumer with the help
of PIC 16f 628 microcontrollers, traic, step up transformer & load sensing
circuitry to provide desired terminal voltage.
Achievements
 Gold medallist in 2ndand 3 rd year for academic excellence.
 Active member of GENEKIT society (department of Electrical & Electronics
engineering, KIT).
 Participated in various cultural & technical events at college level.
 Actively participated in INSIGNIA’11 (techno-cultural festival) of KIT.
Hobbies and Interests
 Playing Cricket and Football.
 Music enthusiast.
 Watching movies.
Personal Details
Father’s Name : Mr. Meraj Khan.
Date of Birth : 02/01/1994.
Sex : Male.
Marital Status : Single.
Language Known : English, Hindi & Urdu.
Home Town : Ghazipur, U.P.
Nationality : Indian.
Declaration
I assert you that the information furnished above are all true to my knowledge.
DATE:
PLACE: (Ehtesham Khan)
